title: Nashik Sports Klub
summary: A race-safe booking platform for real sports inventory.
detail: Built a multi-tenant booking system for Pickleball and Cricket with temporary slot holds, MongoDB transactions, role-specific workflows, real-time availability, secure authentication, and an AWS delivery pipeline.
highlights: A 500-user concurrency test committed exactly one booking for the final slot.
Atomic transactions and compound indexes protect inventory under load.
Administrators, walk-in staff, and customers each receive purpose-built workflows.

title: This portfolio + RAG
summary: An inspectable portfolio that can answer for itself.
detail: Designed trained retrieval routes, streamed answers, model fallback, visible evidence, timing receipts, and provider-aware limits. The system combines a React interface, FastAPI services, PostgreSQL with pgvector, and multiple embedding spaces.
highlights: Every answer exposes retrieved evidence, similarity scores, and latency.
Provider-aware routing keeps model cost predictable while preserving fallbacks.
The corpus and vector indexes can be rebuilt from one repeatable data workflow.

title: Real-time MERN Chat
summary: Event-driven messaging with secure authentication and an AI assistant.
detail: Built a live messaging application with Socket.IO, Google OAuth, Firebase authentication, JWT security, MongoDB chat schemas, React Context state, and a Gemini-powered assistant.
highlights: Real-time conversations are delivered through an event-driven Socket.IO layer.
Google OAuth, Firebase, and JWTs support secure identity flows.
The application has supported more than 100 users and 500 messages.
